personal.name: Ipsha Verma
personal.heroBio: I'm Ipsha Verma, a Data Analyst and B.Tech IT graduate from MITS Gwalior. I specialize in transforming complex datasets into actionable insights using SQL, Python, and Power BI — driving smarter decisions across industries.
personal.aboutBio1: I am a Data Analyst dedicated to transforming complex industrial and business datasets into clear, actionable insights. My expertise spans SQL-based querying of 500K+ records, Python-driven automation, anomaly detection, and interactive Power BI dashboards that empower real-time decision-making.
personal.aboutBio2: When I'm not crunching data, you'll find me exploring new visualization techniques, building end-to-end analytics pipelines, or sharpening my skills in machine learning and statistical modeling.
personal.contactBio: Have a data challenge or analytics project in mind? I'd love to help uncover insights that drive real business decisions. Let's connect.

education.institution: Madhav Institute of Technology and Science

experience.description: Analyzed 500K+ real-time SCADA and industrial sensor records using SQL and Python to support predictive maintenance across energy, utilities, and manufacturing assets. Cleaned and standardized 100+ equipment data streams, built 40+ automated validation checks reducing false anomaly alerts by ~35%, and developed 6 Power BI dashboards for real-time equipment health monitoring.

projects.title: Enterprise Sales Analytics Platform
projects.description: End-to-End BI & SQL project processing 60K+ sales records across 25+ product categories and 4 regions. Built a star-schema data model and interactive Power BI dashboard with 8+ KPIs (Revenue, Profit Margin, AOV, Sales Growth), identifying top 10 products contributing ~35% of total revenue.

projects.title: User Funnel & Campaign Performance Analysis
projects.description: Analyzed 120K+ user events to map the full conversion funnel (Visit → Add-to-Cart → Purchase), identifying a 42% drop-off at checkout. Performed cohort and retention analysis across 6 campaign channels, revealing email campaigns delivered 2.3× higher repeat purchase rate than paid ads.

projects.title: Pricing & Revenue Optimization Strategy
projects.description: Analyzed 120K+ transactions across 15K+ SKUs using Pareto-based SKU segmentation. Found top 20% of products contributed ~72% of revenue. Built a price elasticity simulation model estimating 8–12% revenue uplift from ±10% price adjustments across key categories.

projects.title: Marketing Campaign ROI Analytics Dashboard
projects.description: Evaluated multi-channel marketing campaigns (Email, Google Ads, LinkedIn) across 50K+ interactions. Tracked $250K+ marketing spend, identified Email campaigns with 3.1× higher ROI, and recommended reallocation reducing low-performing ad spend by ~18%.

projects.title: Fraud Detection & Risk Operations Dashboard
projects.description: Processed 50K+ financial transactions across multiple merchants, designing a rule-based risk scoring framework detecting velocity spikes, abnormal amounts, and merchant risk signals. Built a Power BI dashboard with 6+ operational KPIs identifying ~6% high-risk transactions requiring manual review.

certifications.name: Introduction to Python for Data Science

awards.title: National Conference Winner
awards.organization: M.P. Young Scientist Congress (AI Healthcare System)
